item.title: My younger sister wants to be an animator!
item.description: https://youtu.be/10_BniA6Z88?si=2Hu1CtKePiO8Y6Xr?t=58 Hi! I am the older sister of the creator, and I want to share her latest video! She was so surprised by the amount of love from imgur on her video last month that she wanted me to share her unending gratitude. If you decide to make the journey to youtube, let us know you're from imgur in the comments!

item.title: Dumb things I secretly laugh at (meme dump)
item.description:
1. Ear is tasty mmm
2
3. Oh, now it's ooon
4
5. But you have heard of him
6
7. Shout out to camera crane operators.
8. You there! Reading this! What's your type?
9
10. HJAHHAHAJAJHHAhahAHHAHAa
11
12
13
14. Took me a sec
15. What is your passion? Mine is along with posting on Imgur in my spare time (which is like 5-6 hours per night) I work on my passion project which is a wacky "Stanley Parable"-inspired game. If you are a fan and this dump entertained you, chances are that you might like my game too. Please wishlist on Steam, it's a great way to support us, small dev teams: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: I’m your dad now
item.description: I am Native American, I was raised at one point in a white community and at another point in an all black community. Growing up, I was too black for the white community to make friends as I was told and was too white to fit in with the black community. The Hispanic community did not welcome me because I didn’t speak Spanish. My brother was openly gay when it wasn’t culturally acceptable. I understand what it’s like to be a black sheep. If you feel like your family and community won’t accept you, I’m your dad now. I love you and am proud of you. Message me if you want to talk and need bad advice.
item.dc:creator: poorhandwriting

item.title: Musky Musk
item.description: We forgive you
item.dc:creator: ssumner13

item.title: An abuser’s guilt is not their victim’s burden to bear
item.description:
TLDR is pretty much in this meme. . I’m putting myself out there in a vulnerable way by posting this. I’m honestly kinda shaking, but I think this is still something that needs to be said. I’ve been seeing too many posts and comments on the internet of people who were abused by someone with an undiagnosed mental illness. The abuser then gets a diagnosis, gets treatment, and improves, and the family and friends of the abuser are now twisting their victim’s arm into forgiving them because “they were mentally ill!” Some folks even have the gall to say that their victim’s forgiveness is essential to the abuser’s recovery process. This is not okay. You don’t have to forgive your abuser just because they’re mentally ill and now on the mend. I’m talking from the perspective of a mentally ill abuser.
I was not always a good person. It wasn’t intentional. I had A LOT of mental health problems, which included growing up in a severely fractured home life. My parents loved me, but they weren’t good parents. Cluster b personality disorders run on both sides of my biological family tree. There are both sociopaths and narcissists in both my mother and father’s family. Despite being fraternal twins (meaning not identical), my brother and I somehow managed to both get bipolar 1 and autism spectrum disorder in the womb. So basically, I imitated what I saw at home, lashed out in response to what I ENDURED at home, and would spiral into fits of madness that I didn’t understand due to undiagnosed mental illnesses. I did TERRIBLE things during my manic episodes. I did terrible things as an emotionally traumatized child. I was volatile, verbally abusive, and extremely psychologically abusive. One person told me “You’re a mind terrorist.” The things I did were absolutely awful. I don’t even want to talk about it because I’m so ashamed. There are a few victims that I BADLY wish I could apologize to, and get forgiveness from. I even dream about getting their forgiveness. These victims have made it abundantly clear by both saying it and blocking me everywhere that they have no desire to hear from me ever again. AND THAT’S TOTALLY OKAY!
Here’s the thing: My remorse and desire to be better does not entitle me to my victims’ forgiveness. Some apologies are only perceived as harassment, and it would be abusing my victims all over again by forcing them to endure my presence that I am imposing onto them. Like this meme says, there are people that will only ever see me as an antagonizer in their story, and that is 1000% valid. If my treatment was dependent on their forgiveness, then I would be putting my obligation to get better on them. This applies to EVERYONE.
You don’t owe your abuser forgiveness. If they’re trying to put you in a corner by saying that your forgiveness is essential to their treatment, don’t budge. Feel free to quote me directly on this: If they can’t continue to stay stable regardless of your disposition to it, then they’re still putting the responsibility of their problems onto other people. In fact, here’s a meme with this quote to send to someone putting you in that position.
Feel free to send this to the person pestering you to “try to make it right.”
There’s the extra bitchy version if they’re still not getting the hint. I’m sure some folks might complain that I’m not showing enough compassion to the other side by talking a hard stance like this, but I’m actually on the reformed abuser’s side as well: I’m not enabling their giving up just because they didn’t get to alleviate their guilt.
Not that my blessing matters, but now you’ve heard it from someone on the other side that you’re doing nothing wrong. Guilt is OUR burden to bear, not our victim’s.
item.dc:creator: OlivetheNerd

item.title: My Twentyninth Dump
item.description:
Notice how Harley's socks do that thing to the thighs? Anyway, that's bait, you're trapped, here are the memes.
So in the Twentyeighth Dump I complained about how a picture from the Twentyseventh Dump had been removed from public view for breaking imgur guidelines.
AND THEN the Twentyeighth Dump got auto-marked as mature.
Which is probably fine, there were quite a few words like whore, cum, and fuck in that, and I guess Imgur's algorithm is a real pearl-clutcher.
But the Twentyeighth Dump? After twentyseven other dumps full of questionable morality? All right, I guess...
ANYWAY LET'S GOOOOOOO!!!
Bet there are some frogs in this here dump...
... yeah, maybe this dump will be marked mature too...
Frogs!
Paige no
Frog!!
I ducking love corvids.
... I have no idea what this is about, but I think I just scared the tits off all the anatidaephobics out there.
... I really like IPA's though.
Can you imagine such a day that memes like this will no longer be relevant? Like, this one is from November 15th 2023, and the shitshow persists.
Maybe it's my cursing that's getting my posts flagged. Oh duck.
The struggle is real.
Wonk wonk.
I. Want. This. So. Bad.
Oops, Israel-Palestine meme. Now I'm definitely getting flagged.
Italian Elon Musk is still one of the funniest things that's happened in recent years.
This was me last December.
Catstronaut? Astromeowt? Goose?
See y'all tomorrow!
item.dc:creator: Kateness

item.title: A1C is hard for me
item.description: So I recently switched to the Medtronic 780g system because I used to have omnipod and it was too expensive. Thankfully the new system also come with it's own cgm system (continuous glucose monitor) and the pump can then take the info from that and make predictions etc to help make sure my bg stays in range. It does take some work to get the setting just right for you but i found what works for me and my doctor will most likely be very happy because I've had an A1C of about 15ish since i was 6 (diagnosed at age 4). So for me this is a major breakthrough if I can keep it going.

item.title: Mama Java LOVES to be brushed
item.description: It’s lonely being a nursing mama. The only other cats in your life just wanna nurse and sleep. I spend as much time as I can with Java in the kitten room, but she’s not relaxed enough to play. She’s still in survival mode. So the best thing I can do for her is give her pets, scritches, and brushes. You can even hear her purring!! And she actually walked into my lap tonight!! First time ever. She’s very stand-offish and nervous. Slowly but surely, I’m making progress with her. And her babies Cappuccino, Latte, and Espresso are doing so well. Gaining weight, using the litter box (sometimes), and even dabbling in eating solid food. We’re on our way, Java!! (Edit: here’s more video of her babies exploring their new digs the other day: https://imgur.com/gallery/Rssul1X )
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: Images of Note: Polycule onboarding.
item.description:
I swing between eepy and chaos.
Imagine being less of a cunt than Chucky.
Yes!
Imagine being bullied off the internet for (checks notes) liking women in a non-standard way.
Mood
WAAAAAAAAAAHN
You can spam me too at http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
This is basically what Cosmic entities beyond our comprehension are like.
:D
Yes
Unregulated Capitalism will bring back the state and will lead to more war. Remember this.
If you find a backdoor in Propriety software, you have to basically threaten the developer to fix it. If you find a backdoor in open software, you just go fix it yourself.
You know how in satires of communist regimes they make a big deal of increases in production? Well here we are in a capitalist society raging that watching an eclipse meant $700 million dollars of Rich person's yacht money wasn't made.
PUT THIS MAN IN A MAID OUTFIT
Basically the UK rn.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also I streeeem: http://twitch.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Central Social Institution Prague Czechoslovakia
item.description: In 1937, the offices of the Central Social Institution in Prague, then Czechoslovakia, had the world's largest vertical letter file cabinets. The cabinets covered more 4,000 square feet, spanned from floor to ceiling and contained more than 3,000 drawers, each stack 10 feet tall, and each drawer nine feet long. This technological advancement drastically reduced the workload, replacing the need for 400 workers with just 20, requiring minimal effort. Still used to this day as far as I can tell
item.dc:creator: McKittyNuts

item.title: It feels different
item.description: Before you upvote my success, I've been smoking on and off for over 30 years. I've quit many times. Even after defeating cancer I went back to smoking. This time feels different though. I don't miss it in the same way. It's a tough habit to quit, I wish you all luck overcoming this stupid addiction.
item.dc:creator: meme2theextreme

item.title: The 20th Century Fox Fanfare - composed by Alfred Newman.
item.description: GET THE PDF FOR THIS PIECE: https://sightreaddrums.gumroad.com/l/... For some reason, this is one of the most requested pieces from my beginner drum students. The 20th Century Fox Fanfare - composed by Alfred Newman. Snare drum sheet music

item.title: By popular request: My "Star Trek" Badge Collection
item.description:
My wife, @BabyEatingPanda, made a post earlier today that went to the FP (https://imgur.com/gallery/5EU8f69). But everyone kept commenting on the Star Trek badge collection in the background of the photos, so I thought I'd share some more photos with details! Enjoy! ((EDIT NOTE: WOW! Front Page! HI EVERYBODY! Thanks Imgur! Just wanted everyone to know, "Roddenberry.com" ceased to function as a Trek merchandise site around 2017, so ones with those names are no longer available there—I just used the site as a vendor name, which Imgur automatically turns it into a link. Just don't want to mislead anyone as to where these are available from. This collection is a result of years of collecting from defunct sources, clever eBay saved searches, and Private Prop Group procurement; so most are not readily available. If you need any tips, or are looking for something specific, let me know!))
THE TOS MOVIES COLLECTION - These are some of the rarest and hardest to find badges and pins that I have. It also is the collection that contains the most disperate amount of badges for the same uniform, as the Monster Maroon were quite laden with hardware. Accuracy is kind of wild, but there's some original Roddenberry.com pieces in here as well as Lincoln Enterprises (kind of one and the same, really) which were made by Studio Art Metal, who supplied the original pins and badges to Paramount for the films. Some on here are just absurdly expensive, such as the Anovos Chest Insignia which only came with the Monster Maroon Uniforms they sold and goes for buku-bucks nowadays, and an original Roddenberry.com Chest Insignia which is the most screen accurate and a collector's item. A - Federation diplomat medals 1. Original Lincoln Enterprises Medal; metal, pinback, enamel 2. Custom run medal by Dino Ignacio; metal, pinback, enamel 3. Marco Enterprises Medal; resin, pinback, unpainted B - TOS Movie TMP/Enlisted Badges 1. Custom run; resin, velcro backed, enameled 2. Original Roddenberry.com version; Metal, pinback, powder coated 3. Fansets replica; metal, pinback, powder coated 4. Factory Entertainment TMP Collectors Edition replica; metal, magnet back, powder coated 5. Don Post Studios version; metal, pinback, enameled 6. Chinese knock-off version; metal, pinback, plated C - TOS Movie Officer Badge 1. Original Roddenberry.com version; metal, pinback, enameled/powder coated 2. Custom run by Scott Nakada; metal, pinback, enamel/powder coated 3. Anovos version; metal, pinback, partial enameled/powder coated 4. Fansets version; metal, pinback, partial enameled/powder coated 5. Custom run by Jeff Parks; metal, pinback, partial enameled/plated 6. Don Post version; metal, pinback, enameled D - TOS Movie Ranks and Year pips/squeaks 1. Monster Maroon Sleeve band, with SellGeek Pips & Squeaks; Gaberdine/Soutache, metal, pinback, powder coated 2. Original Roddenberry.com Pips & Squeaks; metal, pinback, plated Across Row 1 1. Roddenberry.com Ensign Rank; metal, pinback, satin plated 2. Roddenberry.com Lieutenant (JG) Rank; metal, pinback, satin plated 3. Custom run fan version Lieutenant (JG) rank, unknown origin; metal, pinback, satin plated 4. Fansets version Lt. Cmdr Rank; metal, pinback, powder coated 5. Fansets version Captain Rank; metal, pinback, powder coated 6. Custom run fan version Fleet Captain Rank, unknown origin; metal, pinback, satin plated Row 2 1. Custom run fan version Lieutenant Commander Rank, unknown origin; metal, pinback, plated 2. Custom run fan version Lieutenant Rank, unknown origin ; metal, pinback, plated Down 1. Custom run fan version Fleet Admiral C in C, unknown origin; metal, pinback, plated 2. Custom run fan version Fleet Admiral, unknown origin; metal, pinback, plated 3. Original Roddenberry.com Admiral rank; metal, pinback, satin plated 4. Fansets version Rear Admiral; metal, pinback, powder coated 5. Custom run fan version Commodore Rank, unknown origin; metal, pinback, plated Lower right corner: Monster Maroon shoulder strap w/ Custom run Fleet Captain Rank & SellGeek Strap Closure; wool Gaberdine, Soutache, metal, plated
CHRONOLOGICAL PINBACKS - This collection is of all my pinback versions, arranged in close to chronological order within the Star Trek timeline. Some are from fictional or alternate timelines and are denoted as such. You can definitely see the quality and accuracy difference between early Hollywood Pins/Fan Created versions and later Fansets versions. I definitely like the powder coating vs the plated look. Still has some gaps to fill. A - STD/SNW 1. Custom run by Jeff Parks STD Command badge; metal, pinback, plated/powder coated 2. Custom run by Jeff Parks SNW Command Badge; metal, pinback, powder coated 3. Chinese knock-off SNW Command Badge; metal, pinback, powder coated 4. Fansets version, SNW Command; metal, pinback, powder coated 5. Fansets version, SNW Sciences; metal, pinback, powder coated 6. Fansets version, SNW Operations; metal, pinback, powder coated B - TOS Movie Officer insignia badge 1. Original Lincoln Enterprises version; metal, pinback, enameled 2. Don Post version; metal, pinback, enameled 3. Custom run by Jeff Parks; metal, pinback, partial enameled/plated C - TNG/LD/PROD Badges 1. Custom run by Jeff Parks TNG combadge; metal, pinback, powder coated 2. Fansets version TNG Officers Combadge; metal, pinback, powder coated 3. Fansets version Enlisted Officer TNG Combadge, Season 1; metal, pinback, powder coated 4. Fansets version Enlisted Officer TNG Combadge, Season 2 - 4; metal, pinback, powder coated 5. Hollywood Pins version TNG Movies Combadge; metal, pinback, plated 6. Fansets version TNG Movies Combadge; metal, pinback, powder coated 7. Fansets version TNG Era Rank Pips; metal, pinback, powder coated 8. Fansets version Lower Decks Era Combadge; metal, pinback, plated 9. Fansets version Lower Decks Era Section31 Combadge; metal, pinback, enameled 10. Fansets version Prodigy Combadge; metal, pinback, powder coated D - Future Era/Alternate Reality Badges 1. Star Trek Online Promo c. 2400 Combadge; metal, pinback, powder coated 2. Fansets version Picard Season 2 & 3 Combadge; metal, pinback, plated 3. Fansets version Picard Season 1 Combadge; metal, pinback, powder coated 4. Fansets version STD 31st Century Tricom; metal, pinback, plated 5. QMX metal versions of Kelvinverse Badges, L to R: Operations, Sciences, Cadet Instructor, Command, Medical; metal, pinback, satin plated 6. Chinese knock-off Kelvinverse Dress Uniform Badge; metal, pinback, powder coated E - Parallel Universe/Alternate Timelines 1. Hollywood Pins version "Future Imperfect" TNG Captain's Combadge; metal, pinback, plated 2. Fansets version "Future Imperfect" TNG Captain's Combadge; metal, pinback, powder coated 3. Fansets version "Future Imperfect" TNG Admiral's Combadge; metal, pinback, powder coated 4. Hollywood Pins version "All Good Things" TNG Combadge; metal, pinback, plated 5. Fansets version "All Good Things" TNG Combadge; metal, pinback, powder coated 6. Fansets version Picard "Alternate Late 23rd Century" Uniform Badge; metal, pinback, enameled 7. Fansets version Picard "Confederation" Captain's Combadge; metal, pinback, plated 8. Custom run by Scott Nakada "Renegades" Combadge; metal, pinback, plated
MAGNETICS- This is pretty much the same collection as previous, with a few outliers, like the Orville Trek Badge (love that one) and the 29th Century Combadge. The shadowbox actually contains a piece of velvet wrapped sheet metal to anchor the badges to. A - TOS/SNW/TNG 1. Fansets version SNW Science Badge; metal, magnetic, plated 2. Fansets version SNW Command Badge; metal, magnetic, plated 3. Fansets version SNW Operations Badge; metal, magnetic, plated 4. Fansets version TOS Movies Officer Insignia; metal, magnetic, enameled 5. Fansets version TMP Badge; metal, magnetic, powder coated 6. Fansets version TNG Combadge; metal, magnetic, powder coated 7. Custom run by 25th Century Designs Rank Pips; 3D Printed resin, magnetic, enameled B - TNG/LD 1. Fansets version Enlisted Officer TNG Combadge, Season 2 - 4; metal, magnetic, powder coated 2. Fametek version TNG Bluetooth Combadge; metal/plastic, magnetic 3. IPI version TNG Movie Talking Sound Combadge; plastic, magnetic, faux plated 4. Custom run by FamousPropTreasures TNG Movies Combadge; 3D Printed resin, magnetic, acrylic 5. Fansets version TNG Movies Combadge; metal, magnetic, powder coated 6. Fansets version Lower Decks Era Combadge; metal, magnetic, powder coated 7. Fansets version Lower Decks Era Section31 Combadge; metal, magnetic, enameled C - Future / Alternate Universe Badges 1. Fansets version Picard Season 1 Combadge; metal, magnetic, powder coated 2. Fansets version Picard Season 2 & 3 Combadge; metal, magnetic, plated 3. Fansets version Prodigy Combadge; metal, magnetic, powder coated 4. Fansets version STD 31st Century Tricom; metal, magnetic, plated 5. Custom run by FamousPropTreasures STD 31st Century Tricom; 3D Printed resin, magnetic, acrylic 6. Custom run by FamousPropTreasures "All Good Things" TNG Combadge; 3D Printed resin, magnetic, acrylic 7. Fansets version "All Good Things" TNG Combadge; metal, magnetic, powder coated 8. Custom run "Orville Trek" Badge; 3D Printed resin, magnetic, acrylic 9. Original Roddenberry.com 29th Century Combadge; resin, velcro, acrylic 10. Fansets version 29th Century Combadge; metal, magnetic, powder coated 11. Custom run by FamousPropTreasures "Future Imperfect" TNG Admiral's Combadge; 3D Printed resin, magnetic, acrylic 12. Fansets version "Future Imperfect" TNG Captain's Combadge ; metal, magnetic, powder coated 13. Fansets version "Future Imperfect" TNG Admiral's Combadge ; metal, magnetic, powder coated 14. Fansets version Picard "Alternate Late 23rd Century" Uniform Badge; metal, magnetic, enameled 15. Fansets version Picard "Confederation" Captain's Combadge; metal, magnetic, plated
ASSORTED OTHERS - These are the pins I didn't have room for in the chronological pinback section, Alien Insignias from Trek, or other assorted pins from other franchises. A - Assorted Pins 1. Chinese Knock-off TOS Movie Officer Insignia Badge; metal, pinback, enamel and plated 2. Hollywood Pins TNG Movies Combadge ; metal, pinback, plated 3. Hollywood Pins TNG Admiral Rank Bar; metal, pinback, enameled 4. Hollywood Pins "Future Imperfect" TNG Captain's Combadge; metal, pinback, plated 5. Hollywood Pins Mirror Universe Insignia; metal, pinback, enameled 6. "To The Journey" Day One Supporter Promo pin; metal, pinback, enameled 7. Hollywood Pins TNG 10th Anniversary pin; metal, pinback, enameled B - Assorted Pins 1. Original Lincoln Enterprises TOS Movies "Pips and Squeaks" year pins; metal, pinback, plated 2. Hollywood Pins TNG Rank Pips; metal, pinback, plated 3. Hollywood Pins TMP Engineering Insignia Mini Pin; metal, pinback, cloissone 4. Hollywood Pins "Live Long and Prosper" Pin; metal, pinback, cloissone C - Assorted Pins 1. Custom run Battlestar Galactica Pilot Wings and Admiral Ranks, unknown origin; metal, screwback, plated and enameled 2. Custom run Battlestar Galactica Colonial Dress Uniform Badge, unknown origin; metal, screwback, powder coated 3. Fansets version Starfleet Command Visitor's Badge; metal, pinback, powder coated 4. Custom run Battlestar Galactica Collar Rank Pins, unknown origin; metal, pinback, enameled 5. Carpenter Brut Logo pins; metal, pinback, cloissone D - Assorted Pins 1. LootCrate Hydra Pins; metal, pinback, enameled 2. Marvel Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D. Pin; metal, pinback, enameled 3. San Diego Comicon promo Orville Command Badge; metal, pinback, enameled 4. Custom run Babylon 5 PSI Corp insignia pin, unknown origin; metal, pinback, enameled 5. Hollywood Pins TNG Romulan Insignia; metal, pinback, enameled E - Assorted Pins 1. Fansets version TNG Klingon Communicator; metal, pinback, powder coated 2. Custom run General Chang Klingon Collar Insignia, unknown origin; resin, pinback, acrylic 3. Fansets version Bajoran Communicator; metal, pinback, enameled 4. Hollywood Pins Bajoran Communicator; metal, pinback, plated 5. Custom run TNG Romulan Belt Insignia, unknown origin; resin, pinback, acrylic
And here's my box of spares, doubles, ones I have no space for and other assorted unfinished project badges. Can you name the badges remaining in this box assortment? If you can, you may be as big a nerd as I am.
? Calcifer Tax! (He did start all this with the previous post, after all!) Thanks folks, enjoy the badges!
item.dc:creator: HashMaster9k

item.title: Michael Sheen seems like a decent sort.
item.description: It's a considered response, something a lot of people fail to grasp is needed these days, more than ever. Apologies for the camera work, blame the BBC.

item.dc:creator: ihopeyoucanseethisbecauseimdoingitashardasican

item.title: SecretHarpy's Meme Library: Volume 23
item.description:
Hello and welcome to another meme dump, my imgur friends. I am very tired and have been standing for 10 hours straight and my whole body hurts, therefore it's time to take a reprieve and laugh at some funny shit so we can momentarily forget living in this capitalist hellscape. Onward!
Same
It really has
Just in case!
And getting in trouble for it
haha (ow)
:(
I really wanna do this. And just generally spectate and see the ultimate fate of humanity.
They really dont though lol
its never on the tile
Better save over like 2-3 times. Again, just in case.
So I got shit in my last post for posting something that was censored. And to that I say, guys. I just post the memes. Its like yelling at the cashier, man. I don't control the prices, I don't censor the memes. I just save them. If I ever make something OC I will tell you all very loudly so THEN you can judge me okay? Okay.
...yes. Is it working? No? Right. Let's continue.
SAAAYYYGAAA All right folks, it's the end of this one. Til' next time, stay awesome imgur
item.dc:creator: SecretHarpy
